report.title: 定性考核评分

select.value: select sc.EMP_ID,sc.EMP_NM,sc.EXAM_YEAR,sc.ORG_ID,sc.ORG_NM,sc.BRANCH_ORG_ID,sc.BRANCH_ORG_NM,sc.EMP_TYPE,[#dynamic-columns#] from (select dx.EMP_ID,dx.EMP_NM,dx.EXAM_YEAR,dx.ORG_ID,dx.ORG_NM,dx.BRANCH_ORG_ID,dx.BRANCH_ORG_NM,dx.STUS,dx.EXAM_Q,dx.SCORE,bz.EMP_TYPE from ibs.T2_EMP_DX_SCORE dx inner join ibs.T5_EMP_BZJX bz on bz.MEASURE_DT=dx.MSR_PRD_DT and dx.EMP_ID=bz.EMP_ID and bz.IS_EXAM='1' ) sc inner join ibs.T5_ORG ou on ou.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' and ou.ORG_ID=sc.ORG_ID where {#condition#} and sc.STUS='4' group by sc.EMP_ID,sc.EMP_NM,sc.EXAM_YEAR,sc.ORG_ID,sc.ORG_NM,sc.BRANCH_ORG_ID,sc.BRANCH_ORG_NM,sc.EMP_TYPE order by sc.EXAM_YEAR,sc.BRANCH_ORG_ID,sc.BRANCH_ORG_NM,sc.ORG_ID,sc.ORG_NM,sc.EMP_ID,sc.EMP_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

report.footer:
提示：
审核通过的数据。
